mapper.insert: insert into ggshop.tbl_board ( title, content, board_filter, board_status, board_member_id ) values ( #{title}, #{content}, #{boardFilter.value}, 'active', coalesce(#{boardMemberId}, (select min(id) from ggshop.tbl_member)) )
mapper.select: select b.id, b.title, b.content, ( select f.file_path from tbl_file f join tbl_board_file bf on f.id = bf.id where bf.board_id = b.id order by f.id asc limit 1 ) as representativeFilePath, ( select f.file_name from tbl_file f join tbl_board_file bf on f.id = bf.id where bf.board_id = b.id order by f.id asc limit 1 ) as representativeFileName, case when b.board_filter = '구매' then 'BUY' when b.board_filter = '판매' then 'SELL' else 'ALL' end as boardFilter, case when b.board_status = 'active' then 'ACTIVE' else 'INACTIVE' end as boardStatus, b.board_member_id as boardMemberId, coalesce( nullif(nullif(m.member_nickname, ''), '닉네임을입력해주세요.'), m.member_name, concat('회원#', b.board_member_id) ) as memberNickname, b.created_date as createdDate, b.updated_date as updatedDate from ggshop.tbl_board b left join ggshop.tbl_member m on m.id = b.board_member_id order by b.id desc

select b.id, b.title, b.content, ( select f.file_path from tbl_file f join tbl_board_file bf on f.id = bf.id where bf.board_id = b.id order by f.id asc limit 1 ) as representativeFilePath, ( select f.file_name from tbl_file f join tbl_board_file bf on f.id = bf.id where bf.board_id = b.id order by f.id asc limit 1 ) as representativeFileName, case when b.board_filter = '구매' then 'BUY' when b.board_filter = '판매' then 'SELL' else 'ALL' end as boardFilter, case when b.board_status = 'active' then 'ACTIVE' else 'INACTIVE' end as boardStatus, b.board_member_id as boardMemberId, coalesce( nullif(nullif(m.member_nickname, ''), '닉네임을입력해주세요.'), m.member_name, concat('회원#', b.board_member_id) ) as memberNickname, b.created_date as createdDate, b.updated_date as updatedDate from ggshop.tbl_board b left join ggshop.tbl_member m on m.id = b.board_member_id where b.board_status = 'active'
and b.board_filter = '구매'
and b.board_filter = '판매'
and ( b.title like concat('%', #{keyword}, '%') or b.content like concat('%', #{keyword}, '%') )
order by b.id desc limit #{criteria.offset}, #{criteria.count}

select count(*) from ggshop.tbl_board where board_status = 'active'
and board_filter = '구매'
and board_filter = '판매'
and ( title like concat('%', #{keyword}, '%') or content like concat('%', #{keyword}, '%') )

select b.id, b.title, b.content, ( select f.file_path from tbl_file f join tbl_board_file bf on f.id = bf.id where bf.board_id = b.id order by f.id asc limit 1 ) as representativeFilePath, ( select f.file_name from tbl_file f join tbl_board_file bf on f.id = bf.id where bf.board_id = b.id order by f.id asc limit 1 ) as representativeFileName, case when b.board_filter = '구매' then 'BUY' when b.board_filter = '판매' then 'SELL' else 'ALL' end as boardFilter, case when b.board_status = 'active' then 'ACTIVE' else 'INACTIVE' end as boardStatus, b.board_member_id as boardMemberId, coalesce( nullif(nullif(m.member_nickname, ''), '닉네임을입력해주세요.'), m.member_name, concat('회원#', b.board_member_id) ) as memberNickname, b.created_date as createdDate, b.updated_date as updatedDate from ggshop.tbl_board b left join ggshop.tbl_member m on m.id = b.board_member_id where b.id = #{id}
mapper.update: update ggshop.tbl_board set title = #{title}, content = #{content}, updated_date = current_timestamp where id = #{id}
